---
description: "Use when creating or editing docs, markdown plans, execution briefs, reports, and CSV-linked documentation in this repository. Covers doc indexing, decision-ready writing, and cross-AI durability."
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md,README.md,AGENTS.md"
---
# Documentation Instructions

- Keep docs decision-oriented: state what changed, why it matters, and what the next action is.
- New docs in `docs/` should usually be added to `docs/README.md` in numeric order.
- Prefer durable repo outputs over chat-only summaries.
- When citing metrics, point to the supporting CSV, SQL, or script in the same doc.
- If a production fix is blocked outside this repo, write the sharpest diagnostic handoff instead of stopping at analysis.
- Preserve existing numbering and naming style for phase docs.
